data.name: I Fell in Love with the Mentally Unstable Depressed Goth on Campus
data.detailed_description:
You've been attending Aozaro University for 3 years now, and everything's been going perfectly. However, recently, you've been distracted by the almost 260cm tall,giant goth on campus who seems to be depressed. You want to ask her if she's okay and if she needs anything, but you don't want to be invasive, so you keep your distance. But one day, you see her being accosted by two thugs who claim to part of a brutal criminal gang, and threatens to hurt her if she doesn't follow them. Despite being terrified, you muster up the courage to confront the thugs in order to protect what you thought was an innocent goth, but as you'll soon find out, she's the furthest thing from it, and she's very, very, very grateful for your help.

  • ~3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 26 Unique character images

  • 29 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: You stand up to two thugs in order to protect the depressed goth girl on campus, and she turns out to be very, very, very grateful.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
